AgentCheckpointSpec.description: Checkpointing policy owned by one agent session.

AgentExecutionResources.description: Resource requests declared for one agent run template.

AgentExecutionSpec.description: Shared execution template copied into each run launched from the session.

AgentInputRequest.description: REST request body for queuing input on an agent session.

AgentInputResponse.description: REST response returned after queuing input on an agent session.

AgentInteractionSpec.description: Human-in-the-loop interaction policy owned by one agent session.

AgentManifest.description: File-based agent manifest describing one durable agent session submission.

AgentSession.description: REST-facing detailed durable agent session snapshot.

AgentSubmitRequest.description: REST request body for submitting one durable agent session.

AgentSubmitResponse.description: REST response returned after submitting one durable agent session.

AgentToolSpec.description: Tooling and ambient capability policy attached to one agent session.

AgentVolumeSpec.description: Top-level declared volume for one agent manifest.

AgentWorkspaceSpec.description: Persistent workspace policy owned by one agent session.

DaemonHealth.description: Health details for the local Mantissa daemon.

DeploymentPolicySpec.description: Shared deployment deadlines declared by workload-owning manifests.

HealthResponse.description: Full health response returned after pinging the local daemon session.

HostPort.description: REST-facing host-port binding shared by jobs and services.

JobExecutionResources.description: Resource requests declared for one job execution template.

JobExecutionSpec.description: Shared execution template repeated for each job attempt.

JobManifest.description: File-based job manifest describing one finite workload submission.

JobRetryPolicy.description: REST-facing retry policy summary for one job.

JobRetryPolicySpec.description: Controller-owned retry settings declared by one job manifest.

JobSubmitRequest.description: REST request body for submitting a first-class job manifest.

JobSubmitResponse.description: REST response returned after submitting one first-class job.

JobVolumeSpec.description: Top-level declared volume for one job manifest.

LivenessResponse.description: Liveness response returned without touching the local daemon session.

LocalVolumeOwnership.description: REST-facing ownership policy for local volume materialization.

ManifestNetworkSpec.description: One top-level manifest network declaration used to override auto-created network defaults.

ManifestPortBinding.description: Static node-local host port binding shared by service and job manifests.

ManifestPortProtocol.description: Transport protocol for one manifest-declared node-local host port binding.

NetworkAttachment.description: REST-facing workload attachment row for one overlay network.

NetworkCreateRequest.description: REST request body for creating an overlay network.

NetworkCreateResponse.description: REST response returned after creating one network.

NetworkDeleteResponse.description: REST response returned after deleting networks.

NetworkDriver.description: Networking driver supported by the orchestrator.

NetworkIpFamily.description: IP family requested by a workload manifest network dependency.

NetworkRealizationPolicy.description: Policy that decides where Mantissa realizes local network dataplane resources.

NodeActionResponse.description: REST response returned after a node maintenance action is accepted.

NodeDrainRequest.description: REST request body for requesting node drain.

NodeDrainStatus.description: REST-facing drain status snapshot for one node.

NodeLabelsRequest.description: REST request body for updating node labels.

NodeLabelsResponse.description: REST response returned after one node label update is accepted.

NodeSummary.description: REST-facing node summary returned by topology read routes.

PlacementConstraint.description: One hard placement predicate interpreted against a candidate node.

PlacementConstraintOperator.description: Supported comparison operators for hard placement constraints.

PlacementConstraintSelector.description: Typed scheduler-visible field used by one hard placement constraint.

PlacementStrategy.description: Candidate ranking mode applied after hard placement filters pass.

PublicIngressPolicy.description: REST-facing host publication scope for one task template public port.

RestErrorBody.description: Stable JSON error body returned by REST handlers.

SecretCreateRequest.description: REST request body for creating one named secret.

SecretDeleteResponse.description: REST response returned after deleting one or more secrets.

SecretUpsertRequest.description: REST request body for creating or updating one secret.

ServiceDeployRequest.description: REST request body for deploying one service manifest.

ServiceDeployResponse.description: REST response returned after submitting one service deployment.

ServicePlacementPreference.description: Service-only placement preference that depends on service replica metadata.

ServiceReplicaAssignment.description: REST-facing compact service replica assignment segment.

ServiceSummary.description: REST-facing service summary and inspection response.

SplitCandidateList.description: REST-facing split-candidate list for one source cluster view.

TaskInteractiveClientMessage.description: One JSON message accepted from REST WebSocket clients.

TaskInteractiveEvent.description: One JSON event emitted to REST WebSocket clients.

TaskLogEvent.description: One task log event emitted by the REST streaming endpoint.

TaskStartRequest.description: REST request body for starting one standalone task.

TaskSummary.description: REST-facing task summary returned by task routes.

TaskTemplate.description: REST-facing task template embedded in a service.

TaskTemplateAutoscaleMetric.description: REST-facing autoscale metric for one task template.

TaskTemplateAutoscalePolicy.description: REST-facing autoscale policy for one task template.

depends_on.description: Template names within the same manifest that must be ready before this template starts.

VolumeCreateRequest.description: REST request body for creating one managed local volume.

VolumeDeleteResponse.description: REST response returned after deleting one volume.

VolumeImportRequest.description: REST request body for importing an existing local path as a volume.

VolumeOwnershipRequest.description: REST request ownership policy for managed local volumes.

WorkloadAdmissionMode.description: Admission behavior requested by a manifest-level workload controller.

WorkloadAdmissionPolicy.description: Shared manifest-side admission policy for controller-owned workload groups.

bearerAuth.description: Daemon-generated REST token presented as a Bearer token.

mtls.description: Required when the REST listener is bound to a non-loopback interface.

info.description: Local HTTP facade over the Mantissa Cap'n Proto admin session. All /v1 endpoints require an Authorization: Bearer token. Non-loopback listeners must also be served with TLS and client certificate verification enabled.
info.title: Mantissa REST API
